CREATE TABLE dates_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_date DATE);
SELECT day(event_date) FROM dates_table WHERE event_date = DATE '1992-02-15';
SELECT day(event_date) FROM dates_table WHERE event_date = (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM dates_table);
SELECT id, day(event_date) AS event_day FROM dates_table WHERE event_date < CURRENT_DATE;
CREATE TABLE event_details (id INTEGER, detail VARCHAR, event_date DATE, FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES dates_table(id));
INSERT INTO event_details VALUES (1, 'Leap Year Event', DATE '2020-02-29');
INSERT INTO event_details VALUES (2, 'Regular Event', DATE '2023-10-01');
SELECT ed.id, day(ed.event_date) AS event_day FROM event_details ed JOIN dates_table dt ON ed.id = dt.id WHERE day(dt.event_date) = 29;
SELECT day(event_date) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM dates_table WHERE id = 3) AS subquery;
SELECT day(event_date) FROM dates_table WHERE day(event_date) IN (SELECT day(event_date) FROM event_details WHERE detail LIKE '%Event%') ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT dt.id, day(dt.event_date) AS event_day FROM dates_table dt LEFT JOIN event_details ed ON dt.id = ed.id WHERE ed.detail IS NULL;
SELECT day(CURRENT_DATE) AS current_day, (SELECT MAX(day(event_date)) FROM dates_table) AS max_day FROM dates_table;
